<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="docs/src/validator_operator/validator_users.rst" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-rst-code-docs-src-validator-operator-validator-users-bash-66" location="lines:66-69" -->
```bash
    curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --data-raw "{\"party_id\":\"$PARTY_ID\",\"name\":\"$USER\",\"createPartyIfMissing\":true}" \
    https://<URL of your wallet>/api/validator/v0/admin/users

```
